coverage_profile.seniority_signal: Title shown as Senior Equity Research Analyst; spoke as the #11 questioner and received a direct answer from the CFO, indicating established access and analyst standing. n_calls = 1; limited history but title and treatment by management signal senior-level coverage.
coverage_profile.sector_lens: Covers cruise / leisure / travel with a capital-markets tilt (asked about ship financing structure rather than operations). n_calls = 1.
rhetorical_signature: Opener: "Hey, good morning, everyone." (appears in 2025-Q3; n_calls = 1).
Concise, conversational tone — asks a two-part, financing-focused question in one turn.
Seeks practical trade-offs (financing choice and "additional benefits") rather than operational color.

reasoning_style.primary_mode_justification: Question probes company financing strategy and rationale (bond vs ECA) rather than detailed numeric sensitivities; focused on strategic trade-offs in capital markets (2025-Q3).
reasoning_style.follow_up_pattern: Two-part single-turn structure: this one turn contained two related asks (indifference to financing method; any additional benefits). n_turns = 1; 100% of observed turns are two-part.
reasoning_style.evidence_demanded: Seeks mechanism and strategic rationale (e.g., asks about being "indifferent" given a "rate benefit") rather than explicit bps or dollar guidance. n_turns = 1; 0 uses of 'bps' in history.
reasoning_style.anchoring_habits: Anchors on the specific transaction/event just disclosed (the Celebrity Xcel bond deal) and on the phrase 'rate benefit' from his own question. Example: asked about the "bond deal quickly to finance the Celebrity Xcel" (2025-Q3). n_calls = 1.

recurring_concerns.blind_spots: n_turns < 2 for all topics; insufficient history to list recurring topics. In this call (2025-Q3) he did not press on yield dynamics or quarter-to-quarter comps (topics raised by peers like Vince Ciepiel), nor on operational items such as port fees or dry dock impacts which prior analysts asked about on the same call.
recurring_concerns.stance_drift: n_calls = 1; insufficient to characterise stance drift over time.
